bounded_unknowns: This signature attests the gate conditions as verified at the tested commit; the signature commit itself is a successor whose tree was not replayed -- any later byte change re-stales the attestation and no verification claim attaches to successors without a fresh replay.
This record cannot prove the future combined preflight or the 312 emission will pass; it opens the gate to their separate authorization, nothing more.
The post-signature manifest rebuild is verified by the in-repo check, not by a fresh clean-room replay, unless one is separately performed.
